title: BlockCraft

body:
**🌟 Block Craft – Designed for Balance! 🌟**

Block Craft is designed to deliver the perfect balance between performance and an enjoyable multiplayer experience. Built for players who want smooth gameplay, this modpack includes:
	•	Essential performance optimizations
	•	Quality-of-life improvements
	•	Multiplayer-friendly features

Key Highlights

**🚀 Performance Boost**
Includes popular optimization mods like Sodium, Lithium, and FerriteCore for a lag-free experience.

**🛠️ Quality of Life Improvements**
Features convenient utilities such as minimaps, inventory tweaks, and chat enhancements.

**🤝 Multiplayer Friendly**
Carefully curated mods to enhance communication, collaboration, and fun on SMP servers.

Compatible with Fabric and tested on many Minecraft versions.
Whether you’re hosting a server or playing with friends, Block Craft is the ultimate choice for a seamless and enjoyable experience.
